session_label: Tool-shaped gap-fill round: 4 Playwright probes (Caucasus 3 + CBL)
scope: Execute approach B from the tool-shaped gap brainstorm: Playwright probes for manuscript.az + ek.anl.az + manuscript.ge + Chester Beatty viewer.cbl.ie (Anubis patient-headless). Remaining 7 gaps formalized separately in gap_disposition.json.

method_summary.playwright_mcp_native_browser: Playwright MCP browser_navigate/snapshot/evaluate/type/click against each portal. Patient-headless 15s waits for Anubis JS-PoW. Direct fetch-via-evaluate for batch query batteries. Form-field schema inspection before constructing POST bodies.
method_summary.scope_clarification: Caucasus 3 + CBL are the highest-leverage tool-shaped gaps where Playwright is the correct tool and the closure value is materially higher than formalization-only. The other 7 gaps (Milli K + EAP + DLME + OPenn + HathiTrust + NAMAMI + Iranian-5 + Tajik/Beruni/Bukhara + IOM-RAS) are out-of-scope per user-selected approach B; see gap_disposition.json.

portals.main_page_finding: manuscript.az/index.php newly-acquired-manuscripts table mentions 'Jahanshah Hagigi (1405-1467) ... obtained from Istanbul Suleymaniye Library'. Per prior round: this is a copy/microfilm of suleymaniye_fatih_3808 (v1.0 register), not an independent witness.
portals.verdict: PROBED_NEGATIVE_FOR_MS_WITNESSES; 0 new Cihanşah MSS; 3 secondary-lit citations NEW vs v1.0 search_keys.json (F-EDITION2)

4_unique_cihansah_attributed_editions_at.v1_status: v1.0 cites this 1966 Yerevan edition as Hüseyinzade-edited; ANL says editor is Yerevanlı. Possibly Yerevanlı=redaktor while Hüseyinzade=tərtibçi (Soviet editorial-role distinction); F-V1-CORRECTION-1 (attribution clarification)

4_unique_cihansah_attributed_editions_at.v1_status: NEW vs v1.0 search_keys.json; F-EDITION3 (1988 Arabic-script edition); same as the 1987 Yazıçı edition from manuscript.az/ek/ probe? Possibly the same edition with year discrepancy (1987 vs 1988) OR two separate editions. Disambiguation needed.

4_unique_cihansah_attributed_editions_at.physical: 152 pp; 15 cm; Klassik Azərbaycan ədəbiyyatı series
4_unique_cihansah_attributed_editions_at.v1_status: v1.0 register cites 'Rahimov, Hüseyinzade & Aliyev 1986/2006 Bakı: Yazıcı' but ANL records show 2006 publisher is Şərq-Qərb (NOT Yazıçı) AND editorial team replaced Əliyev with Hacı Mail. v1.0 CONFLATES the 1986 and 2006 editions. F-V1-CORRECTION-2 (publisher+editorial team correction)

portals.birth_year_discrepancy: ANL records list Cihanşah's birth as 1397; v1.0 register has no explicit birth-year field but implies 1405. Encyclopaedia Iranica supports 1397 as the conventional Iranian-studies date. NOT register-blocking; documented for future v2.0 reconciliation.
portals.verdict: PROBED_RICH; 4 unique Cahanşah Həqiqi printed editions at ANL Baku; 0 MS witnesses (ANL holds printed only); 3 v1.0 bibliographic corrections + 5 namesake-FP documented
portals.v1_register_impact: ZERO new MS witnesses; THREE bibliographic corrections to search_keys.json + matenadaran_965 + the editions-and-studies backchain

portals.portal: manuscript.ge Georgian National Centre of Manuscripts (Kekelidze Institute)
portals.site_state: Test mode (ვებგვერდი მუშაობს სატესტო რეჟიმში); search input is GET form with field 'search' to action https://manuscript.ge/
portals.search_response_characterization: All 9 queries (Latin + Georgian Mkhedruli) returned the same homepage template body (27,968-28,061 bytes; query echoed in URL slot but no filter applied). Site search is client-side JS or not implemented yet (test mode).
portals.oriental_manuscripts_fund_page: manuscript.ge/oriental-manuscripts-fund.html returned the homepage template; no Persian-specific catalogue exposed in static HTML
portals.scope_finding: Per EAP1526 + prior subagent B + project memory: GNCM Persian holdings are post-Cihanşah Afshar/Safavid period 1736-1796; out of v1.0 scope. Kostikyan 2017 Persian catalogue is paywalled (Academia.edu). No online search backend exposed.
portals.verdict: PROBED_NEGATIVE_VIA_DIRECT_GET; site search non-functional via GET URL parameters in test mode; canonical Persian catalogue is offline-published (Kostikyan 2017); scope mismatch (post-Cihanşah Afshar/Safavid)

portals.framework: Goobi viewer + JSF (Java Server Faces) widget search with ViewState-tracked POST
portals.anubis_resolution: Anubis JS-PoW challenge resolved via patient-headless 15-second wait per project memory's documented pattern; challenge cleared on first navigate
portals.url_query_slot_finding: /viewer/search/<query>/<filter>/<page>/<sort>/<facet>/ URL-path query slot does NOT filter results server-side. Control test with 'xqzwvbnonsense' returned identical 'Hits: 272' as 'jahanshah' and 'shahnama'; URL slot is a UI-state token, not a query-filter parameter. Only JSF widget AJAX with ViewState actually filters.
portals.jsf_widget_form_submit_attempt: Filled widget search field via Playwright type+submit; JSF AJAX triggered navigation that destroyed JS context; post-navigation state was 'Hits: 4577' (whole CBL collection unfiltered); the JSF AJAX appears to have cleared both query and facet on submit OR the search button is bound to the navigation widget rather than filter-apply
portals.persian_collection_overview: DC:persiancollection facet returns 272 Objects; sample titles from random sort: Yūsuf and Zulaykhā by Jāmī (d. 1492) at Per 251; Mīr Khwānd Rawḍat al-ṣafā (d. 1498); Firdausi Shahnama (multiple); zero Cihanşah-attributed titles in sample
portals.prior_round_findings_corroboration: Prior 2026-05-11 chunk D residual-gap probe surfaced CBL Per 134 = Pir Budaq majmua (NOT Hakîkî) via Anubis patient-headless; CBL Per 294 = Chinese-paper specimen per project memory's Chinese-paper search. Pattern: CBL Persian collection is classical poetry / Pir Budaq atelier / Chinese-paper specimens, no Cihanşah witnesses surfaced via Fihrist or via Anubis-resolved probing.
portals.verdict: PROBED_VIA_FACET_INDIRECT; 0 Cihanşah hits in Persian-collection sample; JSF query-filter requires AJAX session orchestration which is out of pragmatic scope; deep query-by-query filtering via Playwright UI form-fill would need session-state persistence across submits
portals.residual_gap_remaining: Deep Cihanşah-specific query battery against CBL Persian collection via JSF AJAX session orchestration (low expected yield; classical-poetry character + provenance trail at CBL shows no Cihanşah lineage)
